business_angle: Amrock Electrical is the Cardiff electrician who brings older homes up to standard - adding sockets, updating tired light fittings, fitting storage heaters and electric fires, and adding EV charging - done tidily, safely to regulations, and explained to the homeowner as the work goes on.
why_this_trader_wins: The reviews describe one consistent, specific specialism: domestic upgrades to existing and older properties, explained clearly and left tidy. Molly bought an older property that needed additional sockets, updated light fittings and a car charger and calls the work 'reliable, high-quality'; Simon had an electric fire installed and connected to a fused spur through the wall, with the fuel effect set up; Rhys had a storage heater removed and replaced; Faye had power run to an outbuilding, 'explained everything clearly' and 'done safely and up to regulations'. This is reassuring, well-communicated domestic modernisation, not generic 'electrical services'.
target_customer: Cardiff homeowners (CF23 and the wider CF postcodes) - often in older or recently-bought properties - who want extra sockets, updated lighting, a storage heater or electric fire, or an EV charger fitted properly, by an electrician who keeps them informed and works to regulations.
page_single_job: Get that homeowner to request a quote (or call/WhatsApp) for a domestic electrical upgrade.

From start to finish, Naz and Henry were absolutely fantastic. Communication with Naz via WhatsApp was seamless; he always responded promptly and helpfully. Henry handled much of the installation work and was consistently friendly, professional, and efficient.

claims_to_avoid: any certification or membership (Gas Safe, NICEIC, NAPIT, Part P, Checkatrade Vetted, TrustATrader, Which? Trusted Trader) - NONE verified; directory_probes show 0 verified profiles (Yell/MyBuilder/Trustpilot are snippet-only single-signal; TrustATrader was an identity homonym and rejected; Checkatrade/RatedPeople/Bark/Houzz/MyJobQuote NOT_FOUND). Faye's review says work was 'up to regulations' - that is a customer's words inside an attributed quote, NOT a badge to claim in site prose.
the home street address '56 Rhyd-Y-Penau Rd' anywhere public - use Cardiff / CF23 only

Google Places junk / broad categories as services: brief.json services[] 'Repairs and maintenance', 'Installations', 'Emergency callouts' are broad niche/Google labels (service_confidence='broad'), not the specific evidenced work - use the four real services derived from the reviews instead. Do NOT advertise 'Emergency callouts' / 24-hour emergency work: it is not evidenced in any review (the 'Open 24 hours' opening_hours is a Google default, not a stated emergency service).
service areas beyond Cardiff / the CF postcodes - Cardiff + CF23 evidenced; surrounding districts derived from CF geography (plausible one/two-van radius, no national footprint).

photo counts as a stat; any invented numbers; 'rewires' or 'consumer unit / fuse board upgrades' as standalone services UNLESS framed generally - no review names a full rewire or board change, so keep services to the four evidenced ones (a consumer-unit option may appear ONLY in the quote-form job-type list per the assignment, as a request option, not an advertised completed service).
personality: calm, reassuring, methodical; an electrician who explains the work, keeps you in the loop, and leaves an older home safer and tidier than he found it
evidence_strength: moderate-content / single-source (rich, specific Google reviews that all point at the same older-home-upgrade specialism; only 1 usable finished photo; no verified third-party profile - Facebook/directories unverified)
pitch_hook_summary: Lead on the older-Cardiff-homes angle (extra sockets, updated lighting, storage heaters and electric fires, EV chargers; explained as you go, up to regulations), backed by 5.0/27 Google.

metadata.manual_review_note: Single-source (Google-only): no verified third-party profile, no email, UK mobile only, contactability=NEEDS_MANUAL_REVIEW. This is a BUILD run; gates/pitch are out of scope per the assignment (pitch_gate enforces at outreach time, not build time). The evidence is specific and usable - same posture as the Kyle Knowles reference build (also source_quality=FAIL). Reviews are unusually on-angle for the heritage/older-home brief.
metadata.authored_blind: Path B authored from the frozen evidence + CLAUDE.md + the webfortrades-site-design skill + the pre-allocated design seed only. Palette family warm-earth (terracotta/rust/sienna over cool clay-stone), body Inter, display Inter Tight (sans-humanist) - clearly distinct from Damo's golden cedar-amber + sawn-timber warm-earth and from the banned warm-cream+serif+terracotta cluster. No reserved-palette overlap with the other 8 deployed sites.
